label: long

Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So, the question is about a 2 by 2 by 4 box and seven 3 by 1 by 1 waffles. I need to determine how many waffles I should eat so that the remaining ones can fit into the box without breaking any. Hmm, interesting.
